message:
fix(e2e): use lazy-loaded seeder in testSession fixture

Bug fixes discovered during code review:
- testSession fixture was calling functions (getTestServer, seedTestSession,
  etc.) that were not imported or in scope
- Now correctly uses getAgentMailSeeder() to lazy-load the module
- Fixed unused variable in agent-mail-seeder.ts
